2026-06-02PSCorrections and Conditional Release ActReappointment of a part-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of CanadaReappointment of René Allard of Québec, Quebec, as a part-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of three years.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada
precis: Reappointment of René Allard of Québec, Quebec, as a part-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of three years.
